name: Together AI
description: AI inference and training platform. Monitor API access and usage.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Together AI at https://api.together.ai
2. Go to Settings > API Keys
3. Click Create API Key and copy it
4. Paste the API key below

checks.name: Together AI App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Together AI API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: Together AI Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Together AI via API.
